tooling_scope: duplicate, idempotency, randomness, ticket, digest, and self-hash guards

guard_behavior.duplicate: same manifest accepted; different manifest for same target STOP
guard_behavior.idempotency: deterministic same PASS; deterministic mismatch STOP
guard_behavior.randomness: stochastic requires a non-empty seed and policy
guard_behavior.ticket: exact frozen 11, six unique integers in 1..49, no duplicate complete tickets
guard_behavior.path: nine-digit BIG draw ID or exact synthetic fixture; traversal rejected
guard_behavior.hash: canonical SHA-256 is deterministic and detects mutation

remaining_blocker: No exact safe no-DB adapter is wired here to generate the 11 real strategy outputs; a real task must verify or implement that adapter under separate authorization and STOP if unavailable.
next_recommended_step: Independent P280AD audit only; do not merge or begin a real publication automatically.
